calculator.title: Calculate your trip
calculator.subtitle: Enter the data to get the cost
calculator.savings: Each person saves {amount} travelling in a group

history.title: History
history.emptyMessage: Your calculation history will appear here
history.clearConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to clear all history? This action cannot be undone.
history.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.emptyMessage: Save your frequent routes for quick access

settings.title: Settings
settings.disclaimer: Prices are indicative. Results are estimates.

info.title: Information
info.aboutDescription: {appName} helps you calculate the fuel cost of your trips quickly and easily. Enter the distance, your vehicle's consumption, fuel price, and number of passengers.
info.disclaimer: * Results are estimates. Actual consumption may vary based on driving conditions, vehicle condition, and other factors.

welcome.slide1Desc: The perfect app to calculate the cost of your trips
welcome.slide2Desc: Enter the distance, consumption, and fuel price
welcome.slide3Desc: Save and review all your calculations at any time
welcome.slide4Desc: Follow our tips and reduce your spending

tips.maintainTiresDesc: Proper tire pressure can reduce fuel consumption by up to 3%.
tips.smoothDrivingDesc: Avoid sudden accelerations and hard braking to save fuel.
tips.reduceWeightDesc: Remove items you don't need from the vehicle to reduce fuel consumption.
tips.maintenanceDesc: A well-maintained engine consumes less fuel.
tips.planRouteDesc: Use navigation apps to avoid traffic and find the most efficient route.
tips.useAcDesc: At highway speeds, open windows increase consumption more than AC.
tips.speedDesc: Use cruise control on highways to optimise fuel consumption.
tips.idleDesc: Turn off the engine if you're stopped for more than 1 minute.
tips.refuelMorningDesc: Fuel is denser when cold, so you get more for your money.
tips.topUp: Keep the tank at least quarter full
tips.topUpDesc: This helps the fuel pump stay cool and last longer.

features.darkModeDesc: Easy on the eyes at night
